title: 1 Day 1 Mod V1
description: This is the official modpack for the 1 Day 1 Mod V1 project.
body:
# 1 Day 1 Mod
This modpack will start every year at the 15th of july.

## Description
This is the official modpack for the 1 Day 1 Mod project.
You can find out more on our [Discord Server](https://discord.gg/S6x6Gvfd44)

## How it works
This mod will not outdate. Why? Because there is a new mod every day. These mods are chosen by the players, who are playing with the modpack. If you want a mod to be a part of this modpack, read the tutorial on our Discord Server.

## Official server
There is an official public server too. Everything is allowed, except any other mods or extern advantages.

IP: play.1day1mod.cc
